scope.hidden_evaluation_policy: development leaderboards only; hidden rows reserved for explicit one-shot benchmark protocol

gate.engineering_threshold: 5% relative hidden log-loss improvement on core classification target

full_bounded_baseline_scope.hidden_evaluation_policy: development leaderboards only; hidden rows reserved for explicit one-shot benchmark protocol

calibration_quality_validated.threshold: declared multiclass calibration target and acceptable ECE threshold validated

full_release_evidence.threshold: full NBER release normalized and evaluated

protocol_splits_complete.threshold: all frozen Benchmark v1 split diagnostics executed

row_cap_disabled.threshold: model evidence must cover the full eligible task rows

limitations: This run uses the 100,000-thread bounded normalization, not the full NBER release.
Inspectable model runs use a deterministic per-target row cap because the current full model suite is not yet optimized for hundreds of thousands of rows.
Hidden submissions are one-shot within the recorded lockbox store, but this is not a remote third-party lockbox.
No production model is exported and no causal seller-profit claim is made.

black_box_comparison.claim: formula candidates are retained only on chronological development falsification in this report

development.falsification_condition: Fails if offer ratio and round context do not improve counter prediction.
Fails if low relative offers are not more likely to be declined out of sample.
Fails if timing/category interaction does not beat simpler offer-ratio terms.
Fails if listing-price closeness does not calibrate acceptance probabilities.
Fails if higher relative offers do not reduce chronological development log loss versus base rate.
